sections.title: 1. Concept Overview
sections.body:
### BPT Admission 2026: Course Eligibility, Fees, and Duration

Discover how the Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) programme at TMU can shape your future and empower you to make a meaningful impact in your chosen field.
Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) is a 4-year undergraduate programme followed by a 1-year compulsory clinical internship, designed for students passionate about physical rehabilitation, movement science, and restoring mobility in patients. The course curriculum covers core areas such as anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, kinesiology, and therapeutic exercises. The mandatory internship provides hands-on clinical training in leading hospitals, rehabilitation centres, and physiotherapy clinics, enabling students to develop practical skills and gain real-world experience in patient care and rehabilitation.
Recognised as one of the most promising healthcare courses in India, the BPT programme equips students with both theoretical knowledge and practical skills essential for diagnosing and treating physical impairments. Graduates can pursue careers as licensed physiotherapists, rehabilitation specialists, or sports therapists in diverse settings such as multispeciality hospi…

- [BPT Admission 2026: Course Eligibility, Fees, and Duration](https://www.tmu.ac.in/programme/bachelor-of-physiotherapy-programme)

sections.title: 2. Key Definitions
sections.body:
**Definitions extracted from crawled pages:**

- Teerthanker Mahaveer University stands among the top BPT colleges in India, offering a Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) programme that goes beyond traditional academics. This course equips students with essential clinical and practical skills, preparing them for a successful career in the dynamic field of physiotherapy. Graduates gain hands-on experience in patient care, rehabilitation techniques, and therapeutic interventions, ensuring they are industry-ready and capable of making a real impact in healthcare.
- Remarks: Scholarships are available in the admission Year only. These rules are not applicable on programmes of one year or less than one year duration & Multiple scholarships will not be available.
- Here are several prominent career paths you can pursue after earning your Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT):

sections.title: 3. Core Concepts
sections.body:
### BPT Admission 2026: Course Eligibility, Fees, and Duration

Discover how the Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) programme at TMU can shape your future and empower you to make a meaningful impact in your chosen field.
Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) is a 4-year undergraduate programme followed by a 1-year compulsory clinical internship, designed for students passionate about physical rehabilitation, movement science, and restoring mobility in patients. The course curriculum covers core areas such as anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, kinesiology, and therapeutic exercises. The mandatory internship provides hands-on clinical training in leading hospitals, rehabilitation centres, and physiotherapy clinics, enabling students to develop practical skills and gain real-world experience in patient care and rehabilitation.
Recognised as one of the most promising healthcare courses in India, the BPT programme equips students with both theoretical knowledge and practical skills essential for diagnosing and treating physical impairments. Graduates can pursue careers as licensed physiotherapists, rehabilitation specialists, or sports therapists in diverse settings such as multispeciality hospitals, sports teams, wellness centres, and academia. With increasing awareness of preventive healthcare and physiotherapy, the demand for qualified physiotherapists continues to rise in India and abroad. Teerthanker Mahaveer University takes pride in presenting a comprehensive BPT programme, meticulously crafted to empower students with the skills and knowledge imperative for a flourishing career in Physiotherapy.
Teerthanker Mahaveer University stands among the top BPT colleges in India, offering a Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) programme that goes beyond traditional academics. This course equips students with essential clinical and practical skills, preparing them for a successful career in the dynamic field of physiotherapy. Graduates gain hands-on experience in patient care, rehabilita…

sections.title: 9. Real World Applications
sections.body:
**Applications mentioned:**

- Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) is a 4-year undergraduate programme followed by a 1-year compulsory clinical internship, designed for students passionate about physical rehabilitation, movement science, and restoring mobility in patients. The course curriculum covers core areas such as anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, kinesiology, and therapeutic exercises. The mandatory internship provides hands-on clinical training in leading hospitals, rehabilitation centres, and physiotherapy clinics, enabling students to develop practical skills and gain real-world experience in patient care and rehabilitation.
- Recognised as one of the most promising healthcare courses in India, the BPT programme equips students with both theoretical knowledge and practical skills essential for diagnosing and treating physical impairments. Graduates can pursue careers as licensed physiotherapists, rehabilitation specialists, or sports therapists in diverse settings such as multispeciality hospitals, sports teams, wellness centres, and academia. With increasing awareness of preventive healthcare and physiotherapy, the demand for qualified physiotherapists continues to rise in India and abroad. Teerthanker Mahaveer University takes pride in presenting a comprehensive BPT programme, meticulously crafted to empower students with the skills and knowledge imperative for a flourishing career in Physiotherapy.
- Teerthanker Mahaveer University stands among the top BPT colleges in India, offering a Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) programme that goes beyond traditional academics. This course equips students with essential clinical and practical skills, preparing them for a successful career in the dynamic field of physiotherapy. Graduates gain hands-on experience in patient care, rehabilitation techniques, and therapeutic interventions, ensuring they are industry-ready and capable of making a real impact in healthcare.
- | 7 | Application Fees | Rs 1,000 /- ( One Time ) |
- BPT stands for Bachelor of Physiotherapy, a 4-year undergraduate programme followed by a 1-year compulsory clinical internship that focuses on the study and application of physiotherapeutic techniques to promote health, rehabilitation, and wellness. The programme combines strong theoretical knowledge with extensive practical training, ensuring that students gain hands-on experience and receive high-quality education to become skilled physiotherapy professionals.
